description: Classic, understated class in this original dunhill fragrance for men. The top notes are lemon, clary sage, petitgrain, lavender, with middle notes of rose, jasmine, orris and carnation. The base notes comprise of cedarwood, vetiver, tonka, and leather.Quantity: 75 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
